title: dryopteris menyanthidis
intro: Dryopteris menyanthidis, also known as Male Fern or Polypodium, is a plant species belonging to the Dryopteridaceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating parasitic worm infections such as tapeworms and pinworms, due to its anthelmintic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris menyanthidis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and relieve respiratory issues. Dryopteris menyanthidis is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be found in herbal supplements, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional before consumption.
